_comment: Google Sheets configuration for inventory sync. Create a Google Sheet for each entity, then paste the sheet ID (from the URL) here. gid=0 is the first tab. Run: python scripts/sync_inventory.py

_sheet_templates.horses: name, slug, microchip, life_number, loveracing_id, foaling_date, sex, colour, sire_name, dam_name, breeder, status, image_path, story, trainer_name, trainer_stable, trainer_location, wins, placed, next_up
_sheet_templates.hlts: horse_microchip, horse_name, horse_slug, owner_name, trainer_name, trainer_stable, trainer_location, lease_period_months, lease_start_date, leasehold_stake_pct, investor_return_pct, syndicate_price_nzd, shares_total, shares_sold, price_per_share_nzd, listing_status, marketplace_visible, image_path, story, pedigree, wins, placed, next_up
